channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Jack Antonoff Reacts to Ticketmaster Canceling Some Harry Styles Ticket Sales After They ‘Caught Scalpers’: ‘You Caught You?’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we're keeping you up-to-date on the latest music news. Today, we're talking about Ticketmaster and their latest move to combat ticket scalpers. The company recently announced that they've canceled thousands of tickets to Harry Styles' upcoming residency at Madison Square Garden, after discovering that scalpers had purchased them using multiple accounts."
[Short music transition]
Host: "According to Ticketmaster's global president, Saumil Mehta, the company is working with Harry Styles' team to resell the tickets to real fans at the original prices, which were all under $130. But not everyone is buying Ticketmaster's story. Some fans are skeptical, calling it a PR stunt, and pointing out that the company has made it easy for scalpers to snatch up tickets in the first place."
[Short music transition]
Host: "One artist who's speaking out against Ticketmaster is 13-time Grammy winner, Jack Antonoff. He responded to Ticketmaster's announcement with a tweet that simply said, 'You caught you?' - implying that the company is only taking action now because they've been caught. Fans are rallying behind Antonoff, praising him for calling out Ticketmaster, which was recently found liable for violating federal and state antitrust laws."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "If you're a Harry Styles fan looking to get your hands on one of the newly refunded tickets, you can follow the ticket request process outlined by Ticketmaster on their social media channels. That's all for today's podcast - thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one!"
